name: Car
hint: A motor vehicle with four wheels used for transportation.

name: Motorcycle
hint: A two-wheeled vehicle powered by an engine.

name: Truck
hint: A large vehicle used for transporting goods or materials.

name: Bus
hint: A large vehicle used for transporting passengers, typically along a fixed route.

name: Bicycle
hint: A human-powered vehicle with two wheels.

name: Scooter
hint: A two-wheeled vehicle with a step-through frame and a platform for the rider's feet.

name: Van
hint: A large enclosed vehicle used for transporting goods or people.

name: RV (Recreational Vehicle)
hint: A motor vehicle or trailer equipped with living quarters for recreational purposes.

name: Train
hint: A connected series of vehicles that run on tracks and transport passengers or cargo.

name: Boat
hint: A watercraft used for transportation or recreational activities on water.
